change_log.details: corrected 'sit into car seat' to 'sit in car seat'
deleted duplicate end node 7 and adjusted edges and script_graph
modified duplicate end node 6 from 'apply to several jobs' to 'submit applications'
modified duplicate end node 5 from 'go to the bars with friends' to 'arrive at the bars'
removed due to implicit loop pattern (continue to alternate between feet) that cannot be easily restructured with the given nodes
introduced loop: try on the outfit, if dissatisfied go back to look through clothing and set up again; added nodes 6 and 7
modified duplicate end node 5 from 'get some orange juice' to 'pour a glass of orange juice' to improve logical coherence
corrected 'everyday' to 'every day' in node 0
modified duplicate end node 5 from 'learn to play violin' to 'successfully play a simple piece' to improve logical coherence
modified final node 6 from 'Head to the bench press machine' to 'arrive at bench press machine' for logical closure
corrected 'carry' to 'carry' in node 1 and standardized 'xbox' to 'Xbox' in nodes 0, 1, and 4
modified final node 6 from 'Take Xbox home' to 'bring Xbox inside house' for logical closure
modified final node 6 from 'walk to the grill' to 'arrive at the grill' for logical closure
corrected 'meet' to 'meet' in node 5
corrected 'boating' to 'boating' in scenario and nodes 1, 2, 5, 6
corrected 'Renovate' to 'Renovate' in node 4

introduced loop for officiant availability verification: added node 7 (search for another officiant) and node 8 (officiant confirmed and booked), replaced sequence with loop+and_join structure, updated edges accordingly
converted and_join to select: options are 'get bored of something' or 'run out of energy'
removed duplicate final node 'go on a ride' (node 5), adjusted edges and script_graph to end at 'Drive to destination'
Changed node 5 from 'sprint for the school's track team' to 'finish the sprint' to avoid duplicate scenario endpoint.
Changed node 5 from 'find a way to stay cool' to 'stay cool' to avoid duplicate scenario endpoint.
Corrected 'discuss' to 'discuss' in node 1.
Changed node 7 to 'paving completed'; added node 8 'feel dissatisfied with price' and introduced loop for negotiation process, restructuring edges and script_graph accordingly.
modified duplicate end node 'get in the car' to 'close the car door' to resolve redundancy with 'enter the car'
removed edge '0->5' which bypassed the and_join and created an invalid shortcut from setup directly to final step.
removed edge '2->3' which bypassed intermediate steps (walk into garage, get into truck, start truck) and directly jumped to driving to recreation area.
transformed linear sequence into a loop structure to model repeated work-pay-save cycles; added node 'check bank balance' as entry and modified edges to reflect loop iteration with exit condition.
converted and_join to select because waiting room activities are mutually exclusive options; the original and_join forced all branches to be completed, which is unrealistic.
corrected 'ingredient' to 'ingredients' in node 0 and 'scoop' to 'scoop' in node 3
modified end node 6 to 'enjoy cookies'; added nodes 7,8,9; introduced loop for checking doneness; updated edges and script_graph accordingly
modified end node 5 from 'go to a popular rock concert' to 'enjoy the concert'
corrected 'jot' to 'jot' in node 5
removed extra edge 5->6, fixed edges to match linear sequence, modified end node 8 to 'ingredients are bought'
deleted duplicate end node 6 and edge 3->6; script_graph now ends at node 3
deleted duplicate end node 6 and edge 1->6; removed bypass edge 4->1; script_graph now ends at node 1
deleted duplicate end node 6 and edge 3->6; script_graph now ends at node 3
corrected 'Speak' to 'Speak' in node 4
introduced loop for receptionist interaction: speak, wait for response, retry if no response, exit when response received
modified node 6 to 'reach the car' to remove duplicate scenario end node; introduced loop for walking steps
removed duplicate scenario end node 6; restructured sequence to logical order (look, find, walk, reach, put hand, then kill weeds) and removed illogical connection from kill weeds to look
changed node 6 from 'Sign the form at the end' to 'finish signing the form' to avoid redundancy with scenario and provide logical closure.
corrected 'acknowledge' to 'acknowledge' in node 0, and 'Freshen' to 'freshen' in node 5.
modified node 6 from 'Increase the training time gradually next time' to 'start increasing training time gradually' to avoid redundancy and provide logical closure.
changed node 5 from 'do in life' to 'achieve life fulfillment' for meaningful closure.
added missing edge 4->1 to correctly implement and_join branch b2.
changed node 6 from 'drive to pier' to 'drive to the parking area'
removed duplicate end node 'walk into the kitchen' (node 6) and adjusted edges/script_graph to end at node 4
replaced node 2 with evaluation node 'review total raised against trip goal', introduced loop structure to repeatedly fundraise until goal met
modified node 6 from 'play basketball in high school' to 'complete the high school basketball season' to avoid duplicate scenario endpoint.
modified node 6 from 'get sign up sheet' to 'take the sign up sheet to complete registration' to avoid duplicate endpoint; introduced loop for looking for sheet with retry asking and walking.
modified node 5 from 'get ready for school' to 'head to school' to avoid duplicate endpoint.
converted mis-annotated and_join to select structure, removed decision node 0 and duplicate end node 6, and adjusted edges accordingly
removed duplicate end node 6 and corrected sequence order to start with node 2
corrected 'glance' to 'glance' in scenario and node 6
removed duplicate end node 6 ('get off of the couch') and adjusted edges and script_graph
corrected 'Confer' to 'Confer' in scenario and node 6

introduced select structure for using remote control or manual power button to turn on stereo, added nodes 7 and 8 and adjusted edges and script_graph

removed duplicate end node 'pick out an outfit' (node 6); added nodes 7 ('open the dresser') and 8 ('select dresser clothes') to introduce a select structure for choosing between closet and dresser when picking an outfit
removed node 0 and introduced loop structure: entry '2', retry ['3','4'], exit '7'
added node 'feel the chosen item is not quite right' and introduced loop structure: entry '4', retry ['6','continue'], exit '1'
corrected 'keysfrom' to 'keys from' in scenario and node 6

introduced loop for weekly running practice, modified node 6 to 'complete weekly practice', restructured edges and script_graph

removed duplicate end node 5 'apply for jobs' since the application process ends with clicking the apply link; removed node and edge.

lowercased scenario, node 5 and node 6 for consistency
